docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT LITKE, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LIU, BOLDEN (OWNER OF BEE AUTOMOTIVE ) $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50.00, APPELLANT SHALL RETURN RESPONDENT'S AUTOMOBLE NO LATER THAN 10 BUSINESS DAYS AFTER THE JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF AUG-09-2013 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF STEPHEN LITKE RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF LITKE, STEPHEN
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LIU, BOLDEN (OWNER OF BEE AUTOMOTIVE ) MAILED TO RESPONDENT LITKE, STEPHEN
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR OCT-03-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE GEOFF HOWARD. FILED BY LITKE, STEPHEN LIU, BOLDEN (OWNER OF BEE AUTOMOTIVE )

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LITKE, STEPHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIU, BOLDEN (OWNER OF BEE AUTOMOTIVE ) DEFENDANT SHALL SPEND UP TO 10 ADDITIONAL HOURS AT ITS COST TO CORRECT THE RACING STRIPE USING A METHOD AGREED TO BY THE PARTIES. IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE, DEFENDANT MAY USE A METHOD TO CORRECT THE DEFECTS BY HAND AS DESCRIBED IN COURT. UPON COMPLETION, PLAINTIFF WILL PICK UP HIS CAR AND WILL NOT PAY AND WILL NOT OWE ANYTHING FURTHER TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (RECEIVED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2013 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES. CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ. NOTHING REPORTED. DEPT 525
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED JUL-18-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, BOLDEN (OWNER OF BEE AUTOMOTIVE )

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GEOFFREY HOWARD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-03-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-03-2014
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,830.00 FILED BY LITKE, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, BOLDEN (OWNER OF BEE AUTOMOTIVE ) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT LIU, BOLDEN (OWNER OF BEE AUTOMOTIVE )
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (APPELLANT/DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-09-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-25-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY LIU, BOLDEN (OWNER OF BEE AUTOMOTIVE ) LITKE, STEPHEN

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:15am
Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk Wesley Ramirez, nothing on record. dept 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Bolden Liu appears in pro per with witness Helena Nong. Respondent Stephen Litke appears in pro per. Partis, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Elliot Myles.

EXHA(1): invoice

10:55am.
appellant's evidence retained. matter is submitted

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-09-2013 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Reset From Jul-25-13 To Aug-09-13 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
